objective: Classify valid-accounting empty provider output as FAILED_KNOWN VACUOUS_OUTPUT and reconcile only the exact existing UNKNOWN call from immutable physical response evidence.
executable_blocker: The active mission is parked at UNKNOWN even though an immutable HTTP 200 response proves 5551 tokens, a provider receipt identity, zero content bytes and finish_reason=length.
forbidden_scope: budgets other than exact release of proven usage
stop_condition: Any path accepts UNKNOWN without the exact call/request/raw/body/token/receipt evidence tuple, changes transmission history, or sends a provider call during validation.
expected_receipt: IntegrationReceipt, Core+Worker deploy receipts, exact UNKNOWN-to-RECONCILED receipt, and resumed mission lineage
rollback: Revert the additive commit; preserve UNKNOWN and reservation at WAIT_PROVIDER without retry.
